name: semg.cli._auto_fmt
docstring: Auto-detect output format: JSON when piped, rich text in terminal.

name: semg.cli._resolve_or_exit
docstring: Resolve a name (possibly short) to a single node name, or exit with error.

name: semg.cli.about
docstring: What is X? Progressive context card for a node.

name: semg.cli.add
docstring: Add a node to the graph.

name: semg.cli.between
docstring: How do A and B relate? Shortest path + direct edges.

name: semg.cli.diff
docstring:
What changed structurally? Compare graph against a git ref.

    Defaults to comparing against HEAD (last commit). Use any git ref:
    HEAD~1, main, a commit hash, etc.

name: semg.cli.export_cmd
docstring: Export the full graph.

name: semg.cli.export_dot
docstring: Export graph as Graphviz DOT.

name: semg.cli.export_json
docstring: Export graph as JSON.

name: semg.cli.export_mermaid
docstring: Export graph as Mermaid flowchart.

name: semg.cli.export_text
docstring: Export graph as human-readable text.

name: semg.cli.impact
docstring: What breaks if I change X? Reverse transitive impact analysis.

name: semg.cli.init
docstring: Initialize [bold].semg/[/] in the current directory.

name: semg.cli.link
docstring: Add an edge between two nodes.

name: semg.cli.list_nodes
docstring: List all nodes.

name: semg.cli.main
docstring:
[bold]semg[/] — semantic graph for software architecture.

    A CLI tool for agents and humans to sketch, query, and export
    software architecture as a typed graph.

name: semg.cli.overview
docstring: Orient me. High-level summary of the graph.

name: semg.cli.query_callers
docstring: What calls this node (transitively).

name: semg.cli.query_cmd
docstring: Query the graph.

name: semg.cli.query_deps
docstring: Transitive dependencies of a node.

name: semg.cli.query_incoming
docstring: Incoming edges to a node.

name: semg.cli.query_outgoing
docstring: Outgoing edges from a node.

name: semg.cli.query_path
docstring: Shortest path between two nodes.

name: semg.cli.query_subgraph
docstring: Neighborhood around a node.

name: semg.cli.rm
docstring: Remove a node and all its edges.

name: semg.cli.scan
docstring: Scan source files with tree-sitter and populate the graph.

name: semg.cli.show
docstring: Show a node and its connections.

name: semg.cli.status
docstring: Show graph summary.

name: semg.cli.unlink
docstring: Remove an edge.

name: semg.cli.update
docstring: Update a node's fields.

name: semg.cli.validate
docstring: Check graph integrity.

name: semg.diff._diff_node
docstring: Compare two nodes with the same name, return list of field changes.

name: semg.diff.diff_graphs
docstring: Compare two graphs and return structural differences.

name: semg.diff.load_graph_from_git
docstring:
Load a graph from a git ref (e.g., HEAD, HEAD~1, main, abc123).

    Returns None if the file doesn't exist at that ref.

name: semg.export.format_node
docstring: Format a single node and its connections.

name: semg.export.to_dot
docstring: Graphviz DOT syntax.

name: semg.export.to_json
docstring: Agent-optimized JSON: {"nodes": [...], "edges": [...]}

name: semg.export.to_mermaid
docstring: Mermaid flowchart syntax.

name: semg.export.to_text
docstring: Human-readable text listing.

name: semg.graph.SemGraph.resolve_name
docstring: Resolve a possibly-short name to matching fully-qualified names.

name: semg.graph.SemGraph.validate
docstring: Return a list of integrity issues.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase
docstring: Shared extraction logic for JS and TS.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._call_target
docstring: Resolve a call's function node to (target_name, is_resolved).

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._extract_calls
docstring: Recursively walk AST and extract call edges.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._extract_const
docstring: Extract const/let declarations — only UPPER_CASE as constants.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._extract_imports
docstring: Extract import statements as IMPORTS edges.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._extract_interface
docstring: Extract TypeScript interface declarations.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._get_jsdoc
docstring: Extract JSDoc comment preceding a node.

name: semg.langs.javascript._JSExtractorBase._import_source_to_module
docstring:
Convert an import source string node to a module name.

        './utils' -> 'utils', '../lib/core' -> 'lib.core', 'express' -> 'express'

name: semg.langs.javascript._get_class_name
docstring: Extract class name — handles both identifier (JS) and type_identifier (TS).

name: semg.langs.load_extractors
docstring: Import all lang modules to trigger registration. Silently skip missing grammars.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._call_target
docstring:
Resolve a call's function node to (target_name, is_resolved).

        Returns None to skip the call (dynamic/unparseable).

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._decorator_name
docstring: Extract the name from a decorator node.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._extract_assignment
docstring: Extract module-level or class-level variable assignments.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._extract_calls
docstring: Recursively walk AST and extract call edges.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._extract_imports
docstring: Extract import statements as IMPORTS edges.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._get_docstring
docstring: Extract docstring from a class or function definition.

name: semg.langs.python.PythonExtractor._walk_body
docstring: Walk children of a block/module, extracting classes, functions, and assignments.

name: semg.query.ancestors
docstring: Transitive incoming edges of a given type.

name: semg.query.containment_path
docstring: Walk up the containment chain: [root_package, ..., parent, name].

name: semg.query.descendants
docstring: Transitive outgoing edges of a given type.

name: semg.query.impact
docstring: All nodes reachable via incoming edges of any type (reverse transitive closure).

name: semg.query.shortest_path
docstring: BFS shortest path (undirected — follows edges in both directions).

name: semg.query.subgraph
docstring: Return a new SemGraph containing nodes within `depth` hops of `name`.

name: semg.query.transitive_callers
docstring: Follow incoming 'calls' edges transitively.

name: semg.query.transitive_deps
docstring: BFS following outgoing edges of given rel_types. Default: depends_on, imports.

name: semg.scan._ensure_package_hierarchy
docstring: Ensure parent packages exist as PACKAGE nodes with CONTAINS edges.

name: semg.scan._resolve_edge_target
docstring: Try to resolve an unresolved edge target to a node in the graph.

name: semg.scan._strip_extension
docstring: Strip a known extension, returning the stem. Returns None if no match.

name: semg.scan.collect_files
docstring: Walk paths and collect files with registered extensions.

name: semg.scan.file_to_module_name
docstring:
Convert a file path to a qualified module name.

    Examples:
        src/semg/graph.py       -> semg.graph
        src/semg/__init__.py    -> semg
        tests/test_graph.py     -> tests.test_graph
        app.py                  -> app

name: semg.scan.scan_paths
docstring: Scan source files and populate the graph.

name: semg.storage.find_root
docstring: Walk up from `start` looking for a `.semg/` directory.

name: semg.storage.init_project
docstring: Create .semg/ directory and empty graph file. Return the project root.

name: semg.storage.load_graph
docstring: Read .semg/graph.jsonl and return a SemGraph.

name: semg.storage.save_graph
docstring: Serialize graph to .semg/graph.jsonl atomically.
